tasks.title: Add Zod validation to POST /api/users
tasks.message: Add Zod schema validation to the POST /api/users endpoint. Validate email format, name is non-empty string, role is optional enum of 'user' | 'admin'. Return 400 with validation errors on failure.

tasks.title: Add rate limiting middleware
tasks.message: Add simple in-memory rate limiting to the Next.js middleware. Limit each IP to 100 requests per minute. Return 429 Too Many Requests when exceeded.

tasks.title: Add unit test for isValidEmail
tasks.message: Write unit tests for the isValidEmail function in src/lib/validation.ts. Cover valid emails, invalid formats, edge cases like empty string and unicode.

tasks.title: Refactor duplicated error helpers
tasks.message: The error helper functions in src/lib/errors.ts return plain objects but the routes use NextResponse. Refactor to return NextResponse objects directly and update all usages in route files.

tasks.title: Fix null check in GET /api/users/:id
tasks.message: Fix the missing null check in GET /api/users/:id. If the user is not found, return 404 with a proper error message instead of returning undefined.

tasks.title: Add Zod validation to POST /api/users
tasks.message: Add Zod validation to the POST /api/users route. Validate name (string, min 2 chars), email (valid email format), age (optional, positive integer). Return 422 with field errors.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for helpers
tasks.message: Write Jest unit tests for all functions in src/utils/helpers.ts: formatCurrency, paginate, isValidEmail, slugify. Include edge cases.

tasks.title: Add structured request logging
tasks.message: Improve the requestLogger middleware in src/middleware/requestLogger.ts. Add request ID, user agent, and log as structured JSON. Include response time in milliseconds.
